title: Player Armor Stand
description: A Resource pack that allows Armor Stands to transform into players
body:
![Player Armor Stand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7c61eabf2b889b3be6a7786d02e4c44881e2a50_0.webp)

Player Armor Stand have 5 variant. Default, Sit, Right, Left, Walk.
Simply rename a Armor Stand like this.

![e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7d97cfb172d2816db5c6e2ebcb8b8df1d25ee15.png)
# Requires - [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) (Optional)
# Villager This resource pack is available for all villager variants and their jobs.
Rename your Armor Stand.
Villager without a jobs. for example: ``` Villager Desert ``` if a villager has a job. for example: ``` Armorer Desert ``` _*The baby villager is still in development_ # Player This resource pack includes 50 player skins.
I got these skins from [NameMC](https://namemc.com/).
Players have 5 options. Default, Sit, Right, Left, Walk.
Rename your Armor Stand 1-50. for example:

**Player Default Male & Female** ``` Male1 or Female1 ``` **Player Sit** ``` Male Sit1 or Female Sit1 ``` **Player Right** ``` Male Right1 or Female Right1 ``` **Player Left** ``` Male Left1 or Female Left1 ``` **Player Walk** ``` Male Walk1 or Female Walk1 ``` _*You can also add your own skins to this pack._
# Showcase
